title: OSCORE plaintext size symbol is used without a shared Kconfig definition
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/coap_oscore.c:149 allocates ciphertext with CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX, but lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/Kconfig:19-35 defines only MAX_CONTEXTS, REPLAY_WINDOW, and LOG_LEVEL. lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:145-147 has a private fallback #define for CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX, but that fallback is local to oscore.c and does not cover coap_oscore.c.\n\nImpact: enabling CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE compiles both oscore.c and coap_oscore.c from lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/CMakeLists.txt:8-12, but one translation unit can see the fallback while the other sees an undefined Kconfig symbol. Define LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX in Kconfig or move the default to a shared OSCORE internal header so all OSCORE sources share one contract.
